subject: [PATCH nfs-utils v2 10/16] exportd/mountd: add netlink support for the auth.unix.gid cache

2026-03-30.patch_summary: This patch adds support for the auth.unix.gid cache using netlink in the exportd/mountd components of nfs-utils. The handler resolves a pending request's UID to a group list using getpwuid() and getgrouplist(), and responds via SUNRPC_CMD_UNIX_GID_SET_REQS. This feature is only active when manage_gids is set, matching the behavior of the existing procfs handler. The patch introduces new data structures and functions for handling netlink messages and caching group IDs.
